Announcing the outcome of a background action that the user does not need to acknowledge.

avoidWhen.reason: Communicating a persistent page-level message — use banner so it stays until dismissed.
Reporting an urgent error that must remain on screen — use alert.

components.name: Toggle
components.purpose: Sliding switch implementing the WAI-ARIA switch pattern for a single on or off setting that applies immediately.
useWhen: Flipping a single setting on or off with immediate effect such as notifications or dark mode.

avoidWhen.reason: Picking one option from a small fixed set — use segmented-control instead.
Collecting a deferred boolean (agreement, opt-in) in a Submit-style form — a switch implies immediate effect; use checkbox instead.

components.name: Toolbar
components.purpose: Named grouping of related controls that implements the WAI-ARIA toolbar pattern with DOM-driven roving tabindex.
useWhen: Rendering a row or column of related controls where the whole set should be one Tab stop and arrow keys should move between items.
Wrapping existing cinder controls such as Button, SegmentedControl, and NumberInput without adding toolbar-specific child APIs.

avoidWhen.reason: Building a static flex row of controls that should remain in ordinary Tab order — use inline, cluster, or button-group instead.

components.name: Tooltip
components.purpose: Hover-and-focus triggered descriptive hint anchored to a focusable child element, wired through aria-describedby.
useWhen: Showing a short non-interactive label or description for an icon-only button or terse control.
Supplementing a control with a hint that should appear on hover or keyboard focus and dismiss on Escape.

avoidWhen.reason: Hosting interactive content or focusable controls — use popover instead, since tooltip content is not reachable.
Communicating the only accessible name for a control — use aria-label or visible text rather than tooltip text.

components.name: TransferList
components.purpose: Dual-list assignment control for moving items between an available pool and a selected set.
useWhen: Letting users build a subset from a fixed pool such as permissions, tags, or visible columns.

avoidWhen.reason: The pool needs inline search or filtering - compose search controls around the lists instead.
The user only needs independent checkbox choices - use checkbox-group instead.

components.name: Tree
components.purpose: Composite root that renders a hierarchical tree of tree-item nodes with keyboard navigation and selection state.
useWhen: Presenting hierarchical data such as a file system, organization, or nested categories.
Coordinating single- or multi-select state across all descendant tree-items via the selectionMode prop.

avoidWhen.reason: Disclosing flat sibling sections — use accordion instead.
Switching between sibling views of the same region — use tabs instead.

components.name: TreeItem
components.purpose: Node within a tree that exposes a label, optional children, and expand and selection state through the tree context.
useWhen: Rendering a single branch or leaf inside a tree parent.
Nesting further tree-items as children to form a hierarchy.

avoidWhen.reason: Standing alone outside a tree — it requires the tree context and registry.

components.name: Typography
components.purpose: Renders text with a named typographic variant mapped to the design token scale.
useWhen: Applying a named typographic style (heading, body, caption) with semantic HTML.

avoidWhen.reason: Rendering inline text inside a paragraph — use a plain <span> with CSS.

components.name: VirtualList
components.purpose: Fixed-height windowing primitive for long vertical lists that renders only the visible rows plus overscan inside a native scroll container.
useWhen: Rendering thousands of same-height append-only rows such as logs, event streams, or activity feeds.
You need a reusable primitive that owns native vertical scrolling but leaves row markup to a snippet.

avoidWhen.reason: Rows have substantially variable heights that must be measured dynamically — v1 requires a fixed itemHeight.
Rendering columns or two-dimensional grids — use data-grid for grid semantics and column virtualization.

components.name: VisuallyHidden
components.purpose: Utility primitive that hides content visually while keeping it available to assistive technology, with an optional focusable mode for skip links.
useWhen: Exposing label or helper text only to screen readers without affecting the visual layout.
Implementing a skip-to-content link that appears on keyboard focus.

avoidWhen.reason: Hiding content from everyone — use the hidden attribute or display none instead.
Labelling a form control where a visible label is acceptable — use label directly.

components.name: Waveform
components.purpose: Responsive SVG rendering of time-domain audio amplitude data as a waveform path or bar display.
useWhen: Visualizing pre-recorded or pre-processed audio amplitude samples in a static display.
Showing an audio waveform thumbnail or preview with mocked or pre-computed sample data.

avoidWhen.reason: Real-time live audio capture is needed — wire AudioContext / AnalyserNode yourself and feed samples as props.
Frequency-domain data — use spectrum-chart or spectrogram instead.
